'''Mrp-Mrp Poo''' was considered the [[Lothario Smerg]] of the [[Quenk jazz/Legends|Quenk jazz]] scene. She hosted annual [[Vector Day]] parties at the [[Boulderdash]] terrarium. Several hundred of Poo's close friends and investors attended the event, including [[Dyslogia Twang]], [[Rzsco Snowwt]], [[Tireis Blackandwhite]], [[Eban]], [[Gall Supreme]], [[Bucrkam Inney]], [[Massie Herhis]], and [[Quocrag Mogra]].<ref name="Monsters and Aliens" />

==Behind the scenes==
Mrp-Mrp Poo was mentioned in [[Bob Carrau]]'s ''[[Monsters and Aliens from George Lucas]]'', a book published in [[1993]].<ref name="Monsters and Aliens" /> [[Lucasfilm]] employee [[Leland Chee]], who maintains the [[Holocron continuity database]], has indicated that information contained in the book is [[Canon|non-canonical]].<ref name="Chee">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=690#14724917|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]|date=2006-05-03|time=5:45 PM|quote=And is information from Monsters and Aliens from George Lucas canon? Unless referred to by a source that is in-continuity, the information is non-continuity.}}</ref>
